ava started with 50 pencils. at recess, she gave 4 pencils to emma. later, she lost 2 pencils. in the evening, her dad bought a new pencil case with 15 pencils. emma gave her three times as many pencils as she received at recess. how many pencils did ava end the day with? ask

ava ended with 50 - 4 - 2 + 15 + (3 * 4) pencils. ask

the total number of pencils is 50 - 4 - 2 + 15 + 12. ask

ava's final count is 50 - 4 - 2 + 15 + 12. ask

the final number of pencils is 50 - 4 - 2 + 15 + 12. ask
